scripts.dev: wrangler d1 execute didbox402-db --local --file=schema.sql && wrangler dev src/index.ts
scripts.dev:entitlement: wrangler d1 execute didbox402-db-entitlement --local --file=schema.sql --config wrangler.entitlement.toml && wrangler dev src/index.ts --config wrangler.entitlement.toml --port 8788
